preserved_components.source_of_truth: SQLite workout_record_drafts contains the single active unsaved new-workout editor draft
preserved_components.cleanup: Ordered draft mutation clears only after confirmed save or explicit abandon; failures retain the same draft
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: Route restoration and notifications may fail without changing draft authority

preserved_components.source_of_truth: SQLite draft presence remains authoritative; the preference marker is only a bounded route hint
preserved_components.cleanup: Cleared on completed or abandoned draft and on local-data clearing
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: The 30-minute hint cannot create or reconstruct a draft

preserved_components.source_of_truth: Notification content is derived from the current SQLite draft
preserved_components.cleanup: Cancelled after the authoritative draft is cleared
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: Scheduling, rendering, and tap routing never block or roll back draft mutations

preserved_components.source_of_truth: The mounted AI surface owns picker delivery; the marker contains minimal metadata and never proves sent-turn pixels exist
preserved_components.owner: AiChatImageRecoveryController with Root fallback only when the original owner is gone
preserved_components.cleanup: Cleared after delivery, cancellation, account/session invalidation, or local-data clearing
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: Root recovery is single-flight and may restore an attachment only when the platform returns actual lost data

preserved_components.source_of_truth: The mounted Add Food surface owns picker delivery; the marker is not a food draft or durable image store
preserved_components.owner: PhotoFoodAnalysisRecoveryCoordinator with Root fallback only after owner loss
preserved_components.cleanup: Cleared after delivery, cancellation, lifecycle mismatch, or local-data clearing
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: Recovery is single-flight and cannot fabricate pixels or a Food Draft

preserved_components.source_of_truth: AppDatabase.clearAllLocalData atomically clears local business rows; cloud Chat history remains authoritative for history only
preserved_components.owner: Profile clear action coordinates SQLite clearing and device-only recovery marker invalidation
preserved_components.cleanup: Clears workout drafts, editor hint, picker markers, runtime attachment leases, retry IDs, and local draft handles
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: Cloud history may reload, but it cannot revive cleared local drafts or unavailable pixels

preserved_components.source_of_truth: Document RAG keyword/domain-term normalization, vector retrieval, hybrid fusion, reranking, coverage, and retry remain the evidence layer
preserved_components.owner: rag retrieval pipeline selected by the existing RAG feature flags
preserved_components.cleanup: No Chat orchestration change disables or replaces the active corpus or embedding rows
preserved_components.best_effort_boundary: Retrieval downgrade is reported separately and never becomes a fabricated task-completion success

cases.owning_requirement: AgentDesign: answer FitLog app-logic questions with scoped Document RAG

cases.input: Where is the workout exercise snapshot persisted?

cases.owning_requirement: Product: clear consumed-food text plus current image produces an editable Food Draft

cases.owning_requirement: Product: system failures are honest retryable errors, never user ambiguity

cases.input: The record is saved in the workout_records table.

cases.owning_requirement: AgentDesign: AI never claims an unconfirmed official write completed
